title: DAIR.AI 学院将上线 /learn 技能
full_text:
elvis on X: "My new favorite skill is /learn.
I built it to learn any topic at whatever level you like.
It combines two of my passions: artifacts and learning.
Coming soon to the @dair_ai academy. https://t.co/sMxkfhjeLV" / X
